title: serapias × lupiensis
intro: Serapias × lupiensis is a hybrid plant species, resulting from the cross between Serapias cordigera and Serapias lingua. It is a terrestrial orchid with medicinal properties, containing flavonoids and phenolic compounds that are believed to have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Serapias × lupiensis include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit antimicrobial properties, although more research is needed to confirm these effects. Traditionally, the plant is used in herbal preparations, such as infusions and tinctures, to treat various ailments, including respiratory issues and digestive problems.
